{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's fortress
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon's fortress]] has a wide blue cloud.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
